text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Ah, there's a new scent for this deodorant spray?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Melty blossom, huh? Maybe it's like a super
sweet-smelling flower?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Ah, but girly scents like this don't really match my
image...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Maybe just this once... No, wait! What should I
do?!
